message:
test(rch): Add unit tests for CLI commands module

Add comprehensive unit tests for rch/src/commands.rs:
- TOML parsing tests for workers configuration
- Default value handling tests
- Socket path constant test
- Daemon socket error handling test
- Config directory detection test
- Worker config conversion test
- Hook classification integration test

All 24 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
